milestone: Mumbai Indians eliminated from IPL play-offs
evidence_text: Mumbai Indians were eliminated from the Indian Premier League (IPL) play-offs’ contention after their narrow 2-run defeat.

milestone: Research letter published in JAMA Internal Medicine
evidence_text: Dr. Terhi Piltonen of the University of Oulu in Finland wrote in a research letter published on Monday (May 11, 2026) in JAMA Internal Medicine.

milestone: Renaming of PCOS to PMOS announced
evidence_text: Researchers announced on Tuesday (May 12, 2026) at a medical meeting.

milestone: Integration of PMOS into international guidelines
evidence_text: The Lancet paper lists an eight-stage process of global implementation of the new name, leading up to integration into the international guidelines in 2028.
